description: Seeded P4 fix-cycle violation (BLOCKER b, Codex second-opinion review): a case whose nested `input.cbc` clinical sub-object carries an identifier-shaped field (`mrn`) alongside legitimate lab values. Previously validated cleanly because `clinicalInput.properties.cbc` was `true` (unrestricted). Must now be rejected fail-closed by the schema layer's closed, patient-input-mirrored `clinicalCbc` shape.
